summary: Frontend-only testing for Category Navigator/Sidebar classic view implementation. All 5 features verified successfully on /tr homepage and /tr/acil urgent page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Category Navigator classic styling verified on /tr and /tr/acil pages. All counts show (0) due to no listings in database - this is expected behavior.

home_page_classic_view.details: CategoryNavigatorBase renders with classic styling: uppercase title 'KATEGORİLER (L0 → L1)', border-b pb-2, font-bold, text-slate-700

home_page_blue_link_tone.details: Category links have text-blue-700 class with underline-offset-2 hover styling

home_page_border_container.details: Tree container has 'rounded border border-slate-200 bg-white px-2 py-2' classic styling

urgent_page_classic_sidebar.details: CategorySidebar renders with same classic styling: uppercase title, border container, blue links

urgent_page_tree_expanded.details: Tree is expanded by default (treeBehavior='expanded'), 10 root categories and 102 child categories visible

subcategory_click_parent_navigation.details: Clicking 'Konut' (child, ID: 6712fdc6...) navigates to parent 'Emlak' (ID: 83aa088b...) - URL param uses parent token

category_counts_display.details: Counts shown in parentheses for all categories. Values show (0) which correctly reflects API listing_count values

home_page_tr.title_classes: flex items-center gap-2 border-b pb-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-700
home_page_tr.tree_container_classes: mt-3 rounded border border-slate-200 bg-white px-2 py-2

urgent_page_tr_acil.title_classes: flex items-center gap-2 border-b pb-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-700
urgent_page_tr_acil.tree_container_classes: rounded border border-slate-200 bg-white px-2 py-2
